positive: A mesmerizing, high-contrast, print-ready illustration featuring a stylized forest silhouette composed of elegant trees, ferns, and abstract botanical elements. The entire scene is set against a vibrant, swirling deep space nebula background, dominated by cosmic indigos, ethereal purples, and brilliant electric turquoise accents. The lighting is dramatic and ethereal, backlighting the forest edge to create strong, graphic silhouettes. Use crisp linework, symmetrical composition, and a vivid, yet harmonious, color palette. Minimalist, fantastical, vaporwave-nature style, suitable for central apparel placement.
negative: blur, grainy, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, poor quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, dirty, noise
